name: Roasted Beef with Horseradish Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, stir together all marinade ingredients except parsley and roast.
2. Stir in parsley. Place the roast in the marinade; turn to coat all sides with marinade.
3. Cover; refrigerate overnight.
4. Heat oven to 350°F.
5. Bake the roast in the marinade for 1 1/2 to 2 hours, or until fork tender.
6. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, stir together all horseradish cream ingredients except parsley.
7. Stir in parsley. Cover; refrigerate until ready to serve.
8. Serve over carved roast.
